videos.headline: Notre Dame takes commanding lead with 17 points in 54 seconds
videos.description: Notre Dame runs up the score on Georgia thanks to two touchdowns and a field goal in the span of 54 seconds, including a 98-yard kickoff return.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Notre Dame takes commanding lead with 17 points in 54 seconds) 2025/01/02 ESHEET SOTFULL

videos.headline: Moment of silence held at Sugar Bowl for New Orleans victims
videos.description: A moment of silence is held before the Allstate Sugar Bowl to honor the victims and those impacted by Wednesday's attack in New Orleans.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Moment of silence held at Sugar Bowl for New Orleans victims) 2025/01/02 Esheet

videos.headline: Notre Dame forces early red zone turnover
videos.description: Adon Shuler forces Trevor Etienne's first fumble of the season to give the Fighting Irish the ball in the first.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Notre Dame forces early red zone turnover) 2025/1/2 ESHEET

videos.headline: Georgia's big play diminished by sideline interference penalty
videos.description: Arian Smith's 67-yard reception is cut into after Georgia's Parker Jones is called for a sideline interference penalty.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Gunner Stockton's dime sends the Dawgs into a frenzy) 2025/1/2 ESHEET

videos.headline: Riley Leonard rumbles 32 yards down the field
videos.description: Riley Leonard uses his legs to move Notre Dame into Georgia territory.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Riley Leonard rumbles 32 yards down the field) 2025/1/2 ESHEET

videos.headline: ND's strip sack leads to TD
videos.description: RJ Oben gets home on Gunner Stockton for a strip sack before Riley Leonard dots Beaux Collins for a Notre Dame touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (ND's strip sack leads to TD) 2025/1/2 ESHEET

videos.headline: Notre Dame takes second-half kickoff 98 yards to the house
videos.description: Jayden Harrison runs back the longest kick return in Sugar Bowl history to extend Notre Dame's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Notre Dame takes second-half kickoff 98 yards to the house) 2025/1/2 ESHEET

videos.headline: 'Absolute disaster!' Georgia devastated by brutal drop
videos.description: Gunner Stockton heaves one way down the field but Dillon Bell can't come up with it.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay ('Absolute disaster!' Georgia devastated by brutal drop) 2025/1/2 ESHEET

videos.headline: Gunner Stockton tosses 1st TD of the season for Georgia
videos.description: Gunner Stockton's pass carries Cash Jones into the end zone to cut Georgia's deficit.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Gunner Stockton tosses 1st TD of the season for Georgia) 2025/1/2 ESHEET

videos.headline: Notre Dame stops Georgia in the red zone
videos.description: Notre Dame forces a Georgia turnover on downs with a big 4th-down stop.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Notre Dame stops Georgia in the red zone) 2025/1/2 ESHEET

videos.headline: Marcus Freeman praises all 3 phases for Sugar Bowl win
videos.description: Notre Dame coach Marcus Freeman praises the defense, QB Riley Leonard and special teams for the team's well-rounded win in the Sugar Bowl.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Interview (Marcus Freeman praises all 3 phases for Sugar Bowl win) 2025/1/2 ESHEET

videos.headline: Riley Leonard: 'Had to put my body on the line' in win
videos.description: Notre Dame QB Riley Leonard says he wanted to set an example by making physical plays down the stretch in the Sugar Bowl.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Interview (Riley Leonard: 'Had to put my body on the line' in win) 2025/1/2
